entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Short-duration Cajanus cajan genotypes used in the study

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the leaf area per unit ground area, used to assess plant growth

entities.name: CANOPY LIGHT INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The fraction of light intercepted by the plant canopy

entities.name: PLANT MORTALITY
entities.description: The rate of plant death at maturity

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Water stress applied to the crop at different growth stages

entities.name: STRESS 1
entities.description: Drought stress occurring during the late-vegetative and flowering stages

entities.name: STRESS 2
entities.description: Drought stress occurring during the flowering and early pod filling stages

entities.name: STRESS 3
entities.description: Drought stress occurring during the pod filling stage

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The specific location in Andhra Pradesh where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the research took place

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of seed produced by the plant

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE GROWTH
entities.description: The phase of plant development involving flowering and seed production

entities.name: INDETERMINATE GENOTYPES
entities.description: Pigeonpea genotypes with an indeterminate growth habit

entities.name: DETERMINATE GENOTYPES
entities.description: Pigeonpea genotypes with a determinate growth habit

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to maintain growth and yield under water stress

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: The ratio of leaf area to leaf dry mass

entities.name: REWATERING
entities.description: The application of water to plants after a period of drought stress

entities.name: RAIN SHELTERS
entities.description: Structures used to control water availability for the crop
